flask_blueprint_routing.rationale: Each functional area (core, vpn, bypass, system, updates) is isolated in its own blueprint for maintainability and clear separation of concerns
flask_blueprint_routing.implementation: 5 blueprints registered in create_app(): core_bp, system_bp, vpn_bp, bypass_bp, updates_bp
flask_blueprint_routing.alternatives: Single monolithic route file, MVC pattern with controllers

vpn_manager_abstraction.rationale: Centralized management of VPN service start/stop/toggle across different VPN protocols (VLESS, Shadowsocks, Trojan)
vpn_manager_abstraction.implementation: VPNManager class in core/vpn_manager.py with service-specific logic

key_parsers.rationale: Each VPN protocol has unique key format requiring specialized parsing and JSON config generation

bypass_ipset_management.rationale: Efficient blocking via iptables ipset match, resolves domains asynchronously
bypass_ipset_management.implementation: resolve_domains_for_ipset() in dns_ops.py, bulk_add_to_ipset() in ipset_ops.py
bypass_ipset_management.alternatives: Direct dnsmasq blocking, iptables rules per domain

dnsmasq_config_generation.rationale: Separation of bypass lists and DNS overrides, atomic regeneration and restart
dnsmasq_config_generation.alternatives: Manual dnsmasq config editing, static configuration

dns_spoofing.rationale: Spoof DNS responses for Google AI Studio, Gemini, Colab to bypass regional blocks
dns_spoofing.implementation: DNSSpoofing class generates dnsmasq.conf entries with fake IPs

service_status_check.rationale: Leverages Keenetic's entware init.d system for service lifecycle
service_status_check.implementation: check_service_status(init_script) runs shell command, parses output

backup_restore.rationale: Point-in-time恢复, async restore to avoid blocking
backup_restore.implementation: Creates tar.gz archives, async restore via temp script

update_progress_tracking.rationale: Real-time UI feedback during long-running updates
update_progress_tracking.alternatives: WebSocket, client-side polling with local state

async_service_restart.rationale: Avoid blocking HTTP request during long service restarts
async_service_restart.implementation: Creates /tmp/unblock_restart.sh, runs via subprocess.Popen with pid tracking

dns_override.pattern: iptables DNAT for local DNS redirection
dns_override.rationale: Force all DNS queries through local dnsmasq for consistent bypass
dns_override.implementation: iptables add_dns_redirect() creates PREROUTING DNAT rule, flag file for persistence

emergency_restore.implementation: emergency_restore() clears configs, resets iptables, restarts all services

web_config.rationale: Centralized configuration from .env file, sensible defaults
web_config.implementation: WebConfig reads os.environ, properties for WEB_HOST, WEB_PORT, WEB_PASSWORD, etc.
web_config.alternatives: Direct os.environ access, config file parsing

csrf_protection.rationale: Protect against CSRF attacks on state-changing operations

waitress_production_server.pattern: waitress WSGI server over Flask dev server
waitress_production_server.rationale: Production-grade WSGI server, threaded concurrency, memory efficiency
waitress_production_server.implementation: serve(app, host, port, threads=4) in app.py
